'''tajupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squalorajid|squalorajid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squalorajid|squalorajid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tajupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæjipith|tæjipith]] || [[word:tæjipij|tæjipij]] || [[word:tæjipish|tæjipish]] || [[word:tæjipi|tæjipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajujuputh|tajujuputh]] || [[word:tajujupuj|tajujupuj]] || [[word:tajujupush|tajujupush]] || [[word:tajujupu|tajujupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajuputh|tajuputh]] || [[word:tajupuj|tajupuj]] || [[word:tajupush|tajupush]] || [[word:tajupu|tajupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajufputh|tajufputh]] || [[word:tajufpuj|tajufpuj]] || [[word:tajufpush|tajufpush]] || [[word:tajufpuf|tajufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tajuputhu|tajuputhu]] || [[word:tajupuju|tajupuju]] || [[word:tajupushu|tajupushu]] || [[word:tajupuku|tajupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tajuputh|tajuputh]] || [[word:tajupuj|tajupuj]] || [[word:tajupush|tajupush]] || [[word:tajupu|tajupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tajuputhul|tajuputhul]] || [[word:tajupujul|tajupujul]] || [[word:tajupushul|tajupushul]] || [[word:tajupukul|tajupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tajuputhuthu|tajuputhuthu]] || [[word:tajupujuju|tajupujuju]] || [[word:tajupushushu|tajupushushu]] || [[word:tajupuku|tajupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tajuputhun|tajuputhun]] || [[word:tajupujun|tajupujun]] || [[word:tajupushun|tajupushun]] || [[word:tajupukun|tajupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tajuputhuoro|tajuputhuoro]] || [[word:tajupujuoro|tajupujuoro]] || [[word:tajupushuoro|tajupushuoro]] || [[word:tajupukuoro|tajupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
